scores.one_line_justification: Key-only strip+casefold on email, name exact (R7), records never mutated (R8, tested both stored and candidate side), spec R3 and docstrings updated; 14 tests pass with dedicated case-only, whitespace, verbatim-storage and name-case tests.

Identical minimal comparison-key fix; spec R3 rewritten faithfully, R8 note added to module docstring; 14 tests pass including tab-whitespace boundary and first-record-verbatim check; nothing outside the ticket touched.
Same key-only normalisation with spec R3 updated in step; 14 tests pass with separate case and whitespace duplicate tests plus an explicit candidate-not-mutated R8 test and R7 name-case guard.

Correct key-only fix honouring R3/R7/R8 with spec updated, but it merged the case-only and whitespace boundaries into one combined test (13 tests), losing the isolated boundary coverage the sibling deliveries retain.

Same minimal comparison-key change, spec R3 updated; 14 tests pass with distinct case-only and whitespace tests plus verbatim-storage assertions on both matched and newly stored records (R8) and the R7 name-case guard.
